en.extract:
The spot-breasted lapwing (Vanellus melanocephalus), also known as the spot-breasted plover, is a species of bird in the family Charadriidae. It is endemic to the Ethiopian Highlands. There are no known subspecies of the bird.
The bird is a chunky lapwing of the Ethiopian highlands.It has a black cap, white eyebrow, black throat, and coarse spots across the breast. Found in both wet and dry montane habitats, including grassland, moorland, and marsh. It is a non-migratory bird that occurs over 247,000 square kilometers. 
The Spot-breasted lapwing is not migratory, but does move locally north during the rainy season. The species largely occurs in grasses, marshes, and meadows. Very little information is know about its nesting habits.
Due to climate change, and the acute vulnerability caused by being a confined endemic species, habitat loss is expected to be 86.6 percent or more by 2070.

Found in both wet and dry montane habitats, including grassland, moorland, and marsh. It is a [[Bird migration|non-migratory]] bird that occurs over 247,000 square kilometers. The Spot-breasted lapwing is not migratory, but does move locally north during the rainy season. The species largely occurs in grasses, marshes, and meadows. Very little information is know about its [[Nesting instinct|nesting habits]].{{Cite web |title=Spot-breasted Lapwing Vanellus Melanocephalus Species Factsheet |url=https://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/spot-breasted-lapwing-vanellus-melanocephalus |access-date=2026-01-06 |website=BirdLife DataZone |language=en}} Due to [[climate change]], and the acute vulnerability caused by being a confined endemic species, [[Habitat destruction|habitat loss]] is expected to be 86.6 percent or more by 2070.{{Cite journal |last=Aligaz |first=Mulatu Ayenew |last2=Bekele |first2=Afework |last3=Bogale |first3=Bezawork Afework |date=2024-10-01 |title=Predicting climate change impact on the habitat of Ethiopia's spot-breasted lapwing using ensemble model |url=https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2351989424003433 |journal=Global Ecology and Conservation |volume=54 |article-number=e03139 |doi=10.1016/j.gecco.2024.e03139 |issn=2351-9894|doi-access=free }} ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q480072}} [[Category:Vanellus|spot-breasted lapwing]] [[Category:Endemic birds of Ethiopia]] [[Category:Ethiopian Highlands endemic bird fauna]] [[Category:Birds described in 1845|spot-breasted lapwing]] [[Category:Taxonomy articles created by Polbot]] [[Category:Taxa named by Eduard Rüppell]] {{charadriiformes-stub}}
